nasb.text: It shall be established forever like the moon, And the witness in the sky is faithful.” Selah.

esv.text: Like the moon it shall be established forever, a faithful witness in the skies.” Selah

cnv.text: 又像月亮永遠堅立， 作天上確實的見證。’”

ccb.text: 又如天上亘古不变的月亮， 永远坚立。”（细拉）

csbs.text: 又如月亮永远确立， 像是天上确实的见证。”细拉
